sentences.target: Ich arbeite im Tourismus in unserer Stadt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈaʁbaɪ̯tə ɪm tuˈʁɪsmʊs ɪn ˈʊnzəʁɐ ʃtat/

translations.de: Ich arbeite im Tourismus in unserer Stadt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈaʁbaɪ̯tə ɪm tuˈʁɪsmʊs ɪn ˈʊnzəʁɐ ʃtat/
translations.en: I work in tourism in our town.
translations.es: Trabajo en turismo en nuestra ciudad.
translations.fr: Je travaille dans le tourisme dans notre ville.
translations.it: Lavoro nel turismo nella nostra città.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在我们城市从事旅游业。
translations.yue: 我喺我哋城市做旅遊業。
translations.ru: Я работаю в сфере туризма в нашем городе.
translations.pt: Eu trabalho com turismo na nossa cidade.
translations.he: אני עובד בתחום התיירות בעיר שלנו.
translations.vi: Tôi làm trong ngành du lịch ở thành phố của chúng tôi.
translations.ar: أعمل في قطاع السياحة في مدينتنا.
translations.nl: Ik werk in het toerisme in onze stad.
translations.uk: Я працюю у сфері туризму в нашому місті.
translations.hi: मैं हमारे शहर में पर्यटन क्षेत्र में काम करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Pracuję w branży turystycznej w naszym mieście.
translations.el: Εργάζομαι στον τουρισμό στην πόλη μας.
translations.nb: Jeg jobber med turisme i byen vår.
translations.id: Saya bekerja di bidang pariwisata di kota kami.
translations.sv: Jag jobbar inom turism i vår stad.
translations.ro: Lucrez în turism în orașul nostru.
translations.cs: Pracuji v cestovním ruchu v našem městě.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder med turisme i vores by.
translations.ja: 私たちの街で観光の仕事をしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; predicate of the sentence.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem') governing dative; introduces a locative PP with 'Tourismus'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'im' (dative singular).
Preposition governing dative; introduces a second locative PP with 'Stadt'.
Possessive determiner; agrees with 'Stadt' (dative feminine singular).
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'in' (dative singular).

sentences.target: Der Tourismus hat die Stadt stark verändert.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ tuˈʁɪsmʊs hat diː ʃtat ʃtaʁk fɛɐ̯ˈʔɛndɐt/

translations.de: Der Tourismus hat die Stadt stark verändert.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ tuˈʁɪsmʊs hat diː ʃtat ʃtaʁk fɛɐ̯ˈʔɛndɐt/
translations.en: Tourism has changed the city a lot.
translations.es: El turismo ha cambiado mucho la ciudad.
translations.fr: Le tourisme a beaucoup changé la ville.
translations.it: Il turismo ha cambiato molto la città.
translations.zh-Hans: 旅游业让这座城市发生了很大变化。
translations.yue: 旅遊令呢個城市改變咗好多。
translations.pt: O turismo mudou muito a cidade.
translations.vi: Du lịch đã thay đổi thành phố rất nhiều.
translations.nl: Toerisme heeft de stad sterk veranderd.
translations.hu: A turizmus nagyon megváltoztatta a várost.
translations.hi: पर्यटन ने शहर को काफी बदल दिया है.
translations.el: Ο τουρισμός άλλαξε πολύ την πόλη.
translations.ja: 観光で街は大きく変わりました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; agrees with 'Tourismus' (nominative masculine singular).
Common noun, masculine; subject of the clause (nominative singular).
Finite auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person singular; forms the perfect with the participle 'verändert'.
Definite article; agrees with 'Stadt' (accusative feminine singular).
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'verändert' (accusative singular).
Adverb of degree/intensity; modifies the lexical verb 'verändert'.
Past participle; lexical verb of the perfect construction with 'hat'.

sentences.target: Wegen des Tourismus sind die Preise höher.
sentences.reading: /ˈveːɡən dɛs tuˈʁɪsmʊs zɪnt diː ˈpʁaɪ̯zə ˈhøːɐ̯/

translations.de: Wegen des Tourismus sind die Preise höher.
translations.ipa: /ˈveːɡən dɛs tuˈʁɪsmʊs zɪnt diː ˈpʁaɪ̯zə ˈhøːɐ̯/
translations.en: Because of tourism, prices are higher.
translations.es: Debido al turismo, los precios son más altos.
translations.fr: À cause du tourisme, les prix sont plus élevés.
translations.it: A causa del turismo, i prezzi sono più alti.
translations.zh-Hans: 因为旅游业，物价更高了。
translations.pt: Por causa do turismo, os preços estão mais altos.
translations.vi: Vì du lịch, giá cả cao hơn.
translations.nl: Door het toerisme zijn de prijzen hoger.
translations.hu: A turizmus miatt magasabbak az árak.
translations.hi: पर्यटन की वजह से कीमतें ज़्यादा हैं.
translations.el: Λόγω του τουρισμού οι τιμές είναι πιο ακριβές.
translations.nb: På grunn av turismen er prisene høyere.
translations.id: Karena pariwisata, harga menjadi lebih mahal.
translations.sv: På grund av turismen är priserna högre.
translations.ro: Din cauza turismului, prețurile sunt mai mari.
translations.da: På grund af turismen er priserne højere.
translations.ja: 観光のせいで、値段が高くなっています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition meaning 'because of/due to'; governs genitive.
Definite article; genitive masculine singular agreeing with 'Tourismus'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'wegen' (genitive singular).
Finite copular auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person plural; links subject to predicate adjective.
Definite article; nominative plural agreeing with 'Preise' (subject).
Common noun, plural; subject of the copular clause (nominative plural).
Predicate adjective in comparative degree; complement of the copula 'sind'.

sentences.target: Sie studiert Tourismus an der Uni.

translations.de: Sie studiert Tourismus an der Uni.
translations.en: She studies tourism at the university.
translations.es: Ella estudia turismo en la universidad.
translations.fr: Elle étudie le tourisme à l'université.
translations.vi: Cô ấy học ngành du lịch ở trường đại học.
translations.nl: Ze studeert toerisme aan de universiteit.
translations.hi: वह विश्वविद्यालय में पर्यटन की पढ़ाई करती है.
translations.ja: 彼女は大学で観光学を勉強しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject (capitalization here does not indicate formal 'Sie').
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'studiert' (field of study, no article).
Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP with 'Uni'.
Definite article; dative feminine singular agreeing with 'Uni'.
Common noun (abbreviation of 'Universität'), feminine; object of the preposition 'an' (dative singular).
